title: LoaiEletr/rnaseq pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

sample_id.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

fastq_1.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 1 must be provided, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'

fastq_2.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 2 cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'

condition.errorMessage: Condition must be provided and cannot contain spaces

lib_type.errorMessage: lib_type must be one of: forward, reverse, auto

sequencer.errorMessage: Sequencer name must be provided and cannot contain spaces
